topic.title: operations-governance
topic.shortdesc: Approval rules, on-call mapping, event catalog, rollback strategy, temporal controls, and validation guidance.

section.title: Approval rules
section.p: Make approval authority explicit instead of social convention.

ul.li: High risk releases require engineering lead approval and support lead acknowledgement.
Human docs cannot change alone when sync_source is agent-primary.
No release may enter scheduled outside the declared rollout window.

section.title: On-call routing
section.p: Map incident severity to response ownership.

ul.li: sev1 pages primary and secondary on-call within five minutes.
sev2 pages primary on-call and support lead within fifteen minutes.
sev3 creates a queued task for business-hours triage.

section.codeblock: { "key_columns": [ "severity" ], "columns": [ "severity", "owner", "response" ], "rows": [ [ "sev1", "primary+secondary on-call", "sev1 pages primary and secondary on-call within five minutes." ], [ "sev2", "primary on-call + support lead", "sev2 pages primary on-call and support lead within fifteen minutes." ], [ "sev3", "support rotation", "sev3 creates a queued task for business-hours triage." ] ] }

section.title: Event catalog
section.p: Track durable events and their consumers.

ul.li: release.packet.approved is emitted by workflow-engine and consumed by release-service and analytics-worker.
release.packet.published is emitted by release-service and consumed by notification-service.
incident.created is emitted by release-service when rollout health degrades.

section.title: Rollback strategy
section.p: Define what happens under failure classes.

ul.li: Webhook delivery failures retry three times with exponential backoff before escalation.
Primary database write failures abort publish and escalate to platform-oncall.
Negative rollout health triggers compensate by executing the rollback plan.

section.title: Temporal controls
section.p: Represent windows, deadlines, and SLO timers.

ul.li: Rollout window is a UTC deadline window from 09:00 to 10:00.
Canary health is evaluated every five minutes.
Publish status must reach notification-service within sixty seconds.
